title: Type 2 diabetes mellitus without complications
description: Use for type 2 diabetes when no complication is documented in the record.

title: Essential (primary) hypertension
description: Use for primary high blood pressure when no more specific hypertension diagnosis is documented.

title: Acute upper respiratory infection, unspecified
description: Use for an acute upper respiratory infection when the site is not specified further.

description: Use for low back pain when laterality or a more specific site is not documented.

title: Headache, unspecified
description: Use for headache when no more specific headache diagnosis is documented.

title: Encounter for general adult medical examination without abnormal findings
description: Use for a routine adult preventive exam with no abnormal findings documented.

description: Common CPT code for a mid-level established patient office visit.

description: CPT code for a routine 12-lead ECG including interpretation and report.

title: Comprehensive metabolic panel
description: CPT code for a comprehensive metabolic panel laboratory test.

description: HCPCS code for ketorolac tromethamine injection billed per 15 mg.

title: Hyperlipidemia, unspecified
description: Use when elevated lipids or hyperlipidemia are documented without a more specific type.

description: Use when hypothyroidism is documented without a more specific cause.

description: Use when obesity is documented without further classification.

title: Prediabetes
description: Use when prediabetes is documented.

description: Use for asthma when severity and persistence are not documented and no complication is noted.

description: Use for COPD when no more specific type or acute exacerbation is documented.

description: Use for acute sinusitis when site or recurrence is not further specified.

description: Use when cough is documented without a more specific cough type.

title: Fever, unspecified

description: Use for dizziness, lightheadedness, or vertigo-like symptoms when no more specific diagnosis is documented.

description: Use for fatigue or tiredness when no more specific cause is documented.

description: Use when chest pain is documented without a more specific type or cause.

description: Use when abdominal pain is documented without more specific location or cause.

description: Use when both nausea and vomiting are documented without a specific cause.

description: Use for GERD or acid reflux without documented esophagitis.

title: Constipation, unspecified
description: Use when constipation is documented without further specification.

description: Use for UTI when the specific urinary site is not documented.

description: Use for CKD stage 3 when stage 3a or 3b is not specified.

title: Chronic kidney disease, unspecified
description: Use for chronic kidney disease when stage is not documented.

description: Use when anemia is documented without a more specific type or cause.

description: Use when vitamin D deficiency is documented without further specification.

description: Use when anxiety disorder is documented without a more specific anxiety diagnosis.

description: Use when insomnia is documented without a more specific type.

description: Use for screening mammogram encounter.

description: HCPCS code for ground ambulance mileage per statute mile.
